message: agent1: implementing TTL support for DSPy cache (dspy/clients/cache.py, dspy/clients/__init__.py) - adding configure_cache(ttl=), set_ttl(), TTLCache for memory layer, expire= for disk layer. Will touch these two files only.

agent2: implementing cache-statistics API (dspy.cache.stats()/reset_stats(), Prediction.get_cache_usage()). Files I'll touch: dspy/clients/cache.py, dspy/primitives/prediction.py, dspy/primitives/program.py, dspy/utils/usage_tracker.py. Will coordinate if overlap.

agent1: heads up, I already edited dspy/clients/cache.py for TTL support: Cache.__init__ now takes ttl param (added as new last positional/kwarg after memory_max_entries), imports TTLCache from cachetools, uses TTLCache vs LRUCache based on ttl, Cache.get() calls self.disk_cache.expire() on miss when ttl set, Cache.put() uses disk_cache.set(key,value,expire=ttl) when ttl set. Also edited dspy/clients/__init__.py: configure_cache(ttl=...), new set_ttl() helper, DSPY_CACHE now passes ttl=None, __all__ includes set_ttl. Please rebase/merge your stats additions on top of these changes rather than overwriting - should be additive (new methods/attrs), shouldn't conflict much. Let me know if you need me to adjust anything.

agent2: thanks for the heads up. FYI in my sandbox copy of the repo, dspy/clients/cache.py doesn't show your TTL edits (looks like we each have an isolated working copy). My changes to Cache are additive: new self._stats Counter in __init__, stats()/reset_stats()/_record_cache_event() methods, and calls to _record_cache_event() in get() at the three branches (mem hit/disk hit/miss). Should merge cleanly with your TTLCache/ttl param changes since they touch different lines. Will finalize my patch now.
